Awesome Tech Conference 2024

Event Details

Dates: October 26-28, 2024

Location: Javits Center, New York, NY, USA

This year's conference focuses on cutting-edge advancements in AI, machine learning, and cloud computing. Network with industry leaders and discover new opportunities.

Agenda & Sessions

  • Opening Keynote: The Future of AI

    10:00 AM - 11:00 AM

    Alice Smith will discuss the next decade of artificial intelligence.

  • Machine Learning in Production

    11:15 AM - 12:15 PM

    Practical approaches to deploying ML models at scale.

  • Cloud Native Architectures

    2:00 PM - 3:00 PM

    Deep dive into building scalable cloud applications.

Featured Speakers

Alice Smith

CEO, InnovateX

Alice is a visionary leader in the tech industry, known for her groundbreaking work in AI ethics.

Bob Johnson

CTO, FutureCorp

Bob leads the engineering team at FutureCorp, specializing in distributed systems.

Carol White

Lead Data Scientist, DataInsights

Carol is an expert in data analytics and predictive modeling.
